nasb.text: Even the shoot which Your right hand has planted, And on the son whom You have strengthened for Yourself.

esv.text: the stock that your right hand planted, and for the son whom you made strong for yourself.

cnv.text: 眷顧你右手栽種的根， 和你為自己培育的兒子。

ccb.text: 这棵你亲手栽种和培育的葡萄树。

csbs.text: 就是你右手所栽种的幼苗， 你为自己所坚固的根苗。
